Description: Load an integer (number) from an integer tool arg and apply it to a brush config field
Title: Load Int From Tool Arg

Options.Description: The name of the integer (number) tool arg to load the value from
Options.Label: Arg Name

Options.Description: The brush config field to set the value for
Options.Label: Target Field

Options.Description: When checked, adds the loaded value to the current field value instead of replacing it
Options.Label: Relative

Options.Description: When checked, turns the sign of the value to negative
Options.Label: Negate
